title: SACRAMENTO –
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: Governor Newsom signed AB 1394, enacting the strongest law in the nation aimed at combating child sexual exploitation and child sex trafficking online.
The law will provide survivors of child sexual exploitation the ability to sue a social media platform for deploying features that were a factor in causing harm against them.
The law requires social media platforms to provide a mechanism for victims to report child sex abuse material in which they are depicted.
The signing of AB 1394 sets a nationwide standard in the fight against child sex abuse material.
The law underscores California's commitment to protecting kids in the online world.
The law aims to defend the most vulnerable individuals against online exploitation.
